headline: Nasdaq Nearly Flat in Afternoon Trading, Gets Boost From Chip Bounce
summary: Chip stocks are on the rise in what's been a volatile trading day and they're helping offset Nasdaq losses.  The Nasdaq is down slightly, but has pared back deeper losses seen earlier in the session.  The PHLX Semiconductor Index is up 1.8%, bouncing back from a 0.7% decline earlier.

headline: Dow Drops 800 Points. These Stocks Are a Big Drag.
summary: The Dow fell further in morning trading amid a broad sell-off on Wall Street. The blue-chip index was down 1.5%, or 800 points. The Nasdaq and S&P 500 were also in the red, trading 0.9% and 0.9%, respectively.

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Sherwin-Williams, Raises Price Target to $405
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Arun Viswanathan   maintains Sherwin-Williams (NYSE:SHW) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $391 to $405.
